title: Pretty Girl
title_raw: Pretty Girl (Cheat Codes X CADE Remix)

lyrics.text: I can swear, I can joke
lyrics.translation: 或是誓言，或是玩笑

lyrics.text: I say what's on my mind
lyrics.translation: 我想什么就会说什么

lyrics.text: If I drink, if I smoke
lyrics.translation: 有时酗酒，有时吸烟

lyrics.text: I keep up with the guys
lyrics.translation: 总是与那些男孩呆在一起

lyrics.text: And you see me holding up my middlefinger to the world
lyrics.translation: 不知你是否能看到我高举中指咒骂这世界的样子

lyrics.text: **** your ribbons and your pearls
lyrics.translation: 并不在乎你身上奢华的珠宝和衣服

lyrics.text: 'Cause I'm not just a pretty girl
lyrics.translation: 我可不只是个自恃貌美的女孩

lyrics.text: I'm more than just a picture
lyrics.translation: 我的样子岂是一张照片就可描摹出来

lyrics.text: I'm a daughter and a sister
lyrics.translation: 我也是个女儿，是个姐姐

lyrics.text: Sometimes it's hard for me to show
lyrics.translation: 不过有时很难表露出来

lyrics.text: That I'm more than just a rumor
lyrics.translation: 可我不只是个流言蜚语缠身的女孩

lyrics.text: Or a song on your computer
lyrics.translation: 或者是你电脑里的一首歌曲

lyrics.text: There's more to me than people know
lyrics.translation: 殊不知我还有不为人知的另一面

lyrics.text: Some days I'm broke, some days I'm rich
lyrics.translation: 我曾饥寒交迫，也曾奢侈富有

lyrics.text: Some days I'm nice, some days I can be a *****
lyrics.translation: 有时为人友善，也有时下流淫贱

lyrics.text: Some days I'm strong, some days I quit
lyrics.translation: 也曾拥有迎难而上的坚强，但不乏放弃的念头

lyrics.text: I don't let it show, but I've been through some *****t
lyrics.translation: 我只是将其雪藏起来，但也曾为此吃过不少苦头
